formulas.title: Divisibility by 2
formulas.description: A number is divisible by 2 if its last digit is even

formulas.title: Divisibility by 3
formulas.description: Add all digits; if sum is divisible by 3, so is the number

formulas.title: Divisibility by 9
formulas.description: Similar to rule for 3 but sum must be divisible by 9

formulas.title: Divisibility by 11
formulas.formula: (Sum of odd-place digits) − (Sum of even-place digits) = 0 or divisible by 11
formulas.description: Difference of alternating digit sums must be 0 or multiple of 11

formulas.title: Number of factors
formulas.description: Prime factorize, then multiply (exponent+1) for each prime

formulas.title: HCF × LCM
formulas.description: Product of HCF and LCM equals product of the two numbers

formulas.title: HCF of Fractions
formulas.description: Find HCF of fractions by this rule

formulas.title: LCM of Fractions
formulas.description: Find LCM of fractions by this rule

formulas.title: Sub-duplicate Ratio
formulas.description: Square root of the ratio a:b

formulas.title: Successive % Change
formulas.description: Two successive changes of a% and b%

formulas.title: Population Growth
formulas.description: Population after n years at r% growth

formulas.title: Profit %
formulas.description: SP = Selling Price, CP = Cost Price

formulas.title: SP from Profit%
formulas.description: Find SP when profit% is known

formulas.title: SP from Loss%
formulas.description: Find SP when loss% is known

formulas.title: Marked Price
formulas.description: Selling price after discount on marked price

formulas.title: Principal from SI
formulas.description: Find principal when SI, R, T are known

formulas.title: Compound Amount
formulas.description: Amount after n years at R% compounded annually

formulas.title: CI vs SI (2 years)
formulas.description: Difference between CI and SI for 2 years

formulas.title: Combined Work
formulas.description: A and B working together, T = combined time

formulas.title: LCM Method
formulas.formula: Total Work = LCM(time of all workers)
formulas.description: Take LCM as total work, find efficiency of each worker
formulas.example: A=10d, B=15d: LCM=30. A does 3/d, B does 2/d → Together 5/d → 6 days

formulas.title: A works then B
formulas.description: When A works for x days and B works for y days

formulas.title: Pipe Opened Later
formulas.formula: A fills for x min, then B joins
formulas.description: Calculate work done by A alone first, then together

formulas.title: Unit Conversion
formulas.description: Multiply km/h by 5/18 to get m/s

formulas.title: Average Speed
formulas.description: For equal distances at different speeds
formulas.example: Going at 40, returning at 60: Avg = 2×40×60/100 = 48 km/h

formulas.title: Relative Speed (Same Dir)
formulas.description: When two objects move in same direction

formulas.title: Relative Speed (Opp Dir)
formulas.description: When two objects move toward each other

formulas.title: Train passing pole
formulas.description: Time to cross a stationary point

formulas.title: Train passing platform
formulas.description: Time to cross a platform completely

formulas.title: Downstream Speed
formulas.description: B=Boat speed in still water, S=Stream speed

formulas.title: New Average (added)
formulas.description: Average after adding a new member

formulas.title: Replaced Average
formulas.example: Avg of 10 nos = 15, replace 10 with 20: New = 15 + 10/10 = 16

formulas.title: Alligation Rule
formulas.description: Ratio of quantities = difference of mean values

formulas.title: Replacement Formula
formulas.description: x litres removed and replaced with water, n times
formulas.example: 20L milk, replace 4L each time, 3 times: 20×(16/20)³ = 10.24L milk

formulas.title: Simple Partnership
formulas.description: When time is same for all partners

formulas.title: Age n years ago
formulas.formula: Age n years ago = Present Age − n

formulas.title: Age n years later
formulas.formula: Age n years later = Present Age + n

formulas.title: Ratio of Ages
formulas.description: Set up equation with current ages x, y and n years
formulas.example: A:B = 3:4 now, after 5 years 4:5 → solve: A=15, B=20

formulas.title: Conditional Probability
formulas.description: Probability of A given B occurred

formulas.title: Bayes Theorem
formulas.example: Used in medical testing, spam filtering etc.

formulas.title: Area of Triangle
formulas.example: base=10, height=6: A = ½×10×6 = 30 sq units

formulas.title: Area of Circle
formulas.description: Area enclosed by circle of radius r

formulas.title: Cube Volume
formulas.description: Volume of cube with side a

formulas.title: tan θ
formulas.formula: tan θ = Opposite / Adjacent = sin θ / cos θ

formulas.title: Angle Sum (Triangle)
formulas.description: Sum of angles in a triangle

formulas.title: log(ab)
formulas.description: Log of product = sum of logs

formulas.title: log(a/b)
formulas.description: Log of quotient = difference of logs

formulas.title: Sum of GP (finite)
formulas.description: Sum of n terms of GP (r≠1)

formulas.title: BODMAS Rule
formulas.formula: Brackets → Orders → Division → Multiplication → Addition → Subtraction

formulas.title: Bubble Sort
formulas.description: Best: O(n) when sorted. Stable sort.
formulas.example: Compare adjacent elements, swap if needed. Repeat n times.

formulas.title: Merge Sort
formulas.formula: Time: O(n log n) | Space: O(n)
formulas.description: Always O(n log n). Stable. Divide-and-conquer.
formulas.example: Split array in half → sort halves → merge sorted halves

formulas.title: Quick Sort
formulas.formula: Time: O(n log n) avg | Space: O(log n)
formulas.description: Worst: O(n²) with bad pivot. Not stable.
formulas.example: Pick pivot → partition → recurse on partitions

formulas.title: Heap Sort
formulas.formula: Time: O(n log n) | Space: O(1)
formulas.description: Not stable. In-place. Build heap then extract.

formulas.title: Counting Sort
formulas.description: k = range of input. Stable. Not comparison-based.
formulas.example: Count occurrences of each value, then reconstruct

formulas.title: Linear Search
formulas.example: Check every element until found or end reached

formulas.title: Binary Search
formulas.description: Requires sorted array. Divide search space in half.
formulas.example: Compare with mid → go left or right half

formulas.title: Ternary Search
formulas.description: Divides into 3 parts. Used for unimodal functions.
formulas.example: Two midpoints: m1, m2. Compare f(m1) vs f(m2)

formulas.title: Array Access
formulas.description: Insert/Delete at end: O(1), at beginning: O(n)
formulas.example: arr[i] is O(1), finding element is O(n)

formulas.title: Hash Table
formulas.description: Insert, Delete, Search all O(1) average
formulas.example: Good hash function → minimal collisions → O(1)

formulas.title: BST Balanced
formulas.description: Search, Insert, Delete in balanced BST

formulas.title: Heap
formulas.formula: Insert: O(log n) | Extract: O(log n)
formulas.example: Priority queue operations using binary heap

formulas.title: BFS/DFS
formulas.description: V = vertices, E = edges. Visit all nodes.
formulas.example: BFS uses queue, DFS uses stack/recursion

formulas.title: Dijkstra
formulas.description: Single source shortest path. No negative weights.
formulas.example: Use min-heap priority queue for efficient extraction

formulas.title: Bellman-Ford
formulas.description: Handles negative weights. Detects negative cycles.
formulas.example: Relax all edges V-1 times. If can relax more → negative cycle

formulas.title: Floyd-Warshall
formulas.description: All-pairs shortest path. Handles negative weights.
formulas.example: 3 nested loops over vertices. DP approach.

formulas.title: Turnaround Time
formulas.description: Total time from arrival to completion

formulas.title: Waiting Time
formulas.description: Time spent waiting in ready queue

formulas.title: Response Time
formulas.description: Time from arrival to first execution
formulas.example: Arrives t=0, first runs at t=4: RT=4

formulas.title: Physical Address
formulas.description: Convert logical to physical using page table

formulas.title: 1NF
formulas.description: No multi-valued attributes. Each cell has single value.

formulas.title: 2NF
formulas.description: Non-key attributes depend on entire primary key
formulas.example: If PK=(A,B), attribute C depends on (A,B) not just A

formulas.title: 3NF
formulas.description: No non-key attribute depends on another non-key attribute
formulas.example: If A→B and B→C, remove transitive dependency A→C via B

formulas.title: BCNF
formulas.formula: For every FD X→Y, X is a superkey
formulas.description: Stricter than 3NF. Decomposition may lose dependency.
formulas.example: Every determinant must be a candidate key

formulas.title: JOIN Types
formulas.description: INNER: matching rows. LEFT: all left + matching right.
formulas.example: SELECT * FROM A INNER JOIN B ON A.id = B.id

formulas.title: Aggregate Functions
formulas.description: Used with GROUP BY for grouped calculations
formulas.example: SELECT dept, AVG(salary) FROM emp GROUP BY dept

formulas.title: Subquery vs JOIN
formulas.formula: Subquery: nested SELECT. JOIN: combine tables.
formulas.description: JOINs typically perform better than correlated subqueries
formulas.example: Use JOIN when combining data from multiple tables
